_meta.name: diagnostic_nca
external_method_references: Certara Phoenix WinNonlin NCA parameter formulas (plasma/serum data definitions for AUClast, Lambda_z, AUCINF, CL/F, Vz/F, MRT).
PKNCA introduction and usage vignette (default lin-up/log-down workflow and standard NCA interval/parameter conventions).
Gabrielsson J, Weiner D. Pharmacokinetic and Pharmacodynamic Data Analysis: Concepts and Applications.
_meta.notes: Self-consistent openpkpd regression baseline enriched with analytic one-compartment oral reference checks and cross-tool formula alignment against common NCA parameter conventions. Useful for drift detection, but not yet a published-dataset or direct Phoenix/PKNCA parity reference.
